agents.name: Nic Madsen
agents.title: VP of Commercial Sales
agents.bio:
Nic Madsen is a seasoned commercial real estate professional specializing in investment sales across commercial and multifamily asset classes. As Vice President of Commercial Sales at Gateway Real Estate Advisors, Nic leverages deep market expertise and a results-driven approach to help clients maximize asset value and capitalize on strategic investment opportunities. His commitment to data-informed advisory and client-first execution has established him as a trusted partner for investors, owners, and developers navigating today's competitive marketplace.

Nic began his real estate career in 2018 as an intern.
agents.accomplishments: $100M of Commercial Real Estate Since 2020, Owns nearly 220 units himself, & just sold 500 of his personal storage units.

agents.name: Daniel Stillson
agents.title: Commercial Associate
agents.bio: Daniel Stillson is a driven commercial real estate professional at Gateway Real Estate Advisors, specializing in the acquisition, disposition, and investment analysis of commercial and multifamily assets. He combines sharp market insight with a client-first approach to help investors and owners maximize the value of their real estate portfolios. Daniel is committed to delivering institutional-quality guidance with the personalized attention that leads to long-term client relationships and successful closings.
